---
output: github_document
---

# fishr

Tools to download, clean, and analyse FAO capture fisheries data.

## Installation

```r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("YOUR_GITHUB_USERNAME/fishr")
```

## Example

```{r}
library(fishr)

# Download data
data_dir <- download_fao_capture()

# Load cleaned dataset
data <- load_fao_capture(path = data_dir)

# Plot
plot_top_species_country(
  data = data,
  country = "Iceland",
  year = 2023,
  n = 10
)
```


## Data source

FAO Global Capture Production dataset.

## Status

VERY Early development. Functions and structure may change.
